title: Myrtoleucodendron alsophilum
taxonomy: Myrtoleucodendron alsophilum is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is a type of tree that is native to the tropical regions of South America. The plant belongs to the genus Myrtoleucodendron, which is part of the larger family Sapindaceae. The classification of Myrtoleucodendron alsophilum is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, class Magnoliopsida, order Sapindales, and family Sapindaceae. This classification provides a comprehensive understanding of the plant's evolutionary relationships and place within the plant kingdom.
